title: Working Cache L1 L2 C4 Component Model

containers.name: Tool Invocation Runtime
containers.responsibility: Drives toolcalls; runs L2 post-hook to derive ledger pointers; tracks exploration sequence depth; injects postscript when threshold crossed.

containers.name: Tool Definition Surface
containers.responsibility: Carries kind metadata (exploration | modify | other) for every tool definition.

containers.name: Turn End Fenced Block Parser
containers.responsibility: Scans assistant turn for cache-digest fenced blocks and routes parsed payload to validator.

containers.name: Working Cache Module
containers.responsibility: Owns L1 Entry schema and validation; provides L2 LedgerEntry derivation function over Session.messages; enforces fail-closed evidence freshness.

containers.name: Storage JSON Namespace
containers.responsibility: Persists L1 Entry records under working_cache namespace. L2 reads from Session.messages directly without a sidecar store.

containers.name: Post Compaction Provider
containers.responsibility: Renders Phase B awareness manifest into compaction summary addendum; bounded ≤120 tokens regardless of cache size.

containers.name: Recall Toolcall Index Tool
containers.responsibility: Returns manifest shape on demand for mid-session awareness refresh.

containers.name: Recall Toolcall Raw Tool
containers.responsibility: Returns L2 pointer record; with include_body flag fetches ToolPart output from Session.messages without duplicating into L2.

containers.name: Recall Toolcall Digest Tool
containers.responsibility: Returns L1 digest entries; omits stale entries with explicit reason.

containers.name: Session Message Storage
containers.responsibility: Source of truth for raw ToolPart records; L2 derives over this; recall_toolcall_raw with include_body fetches body from here.

relationships.description: consults tool.kind metadata to classify each toolcall as exploration / modify / other
writes ToolPart records as toolcalls complete (existing path; L2 source of truth)
triggers L2 ledger derivation hook on every read-class tool completion; manages exploration depth counter
submits parsed cache-digest payload for L1 validation and persistence
persists validated L1 Entry records under session-scoped working_cache namespace
reads ToolPart records on demand to derive L2 LedgerEntry pointers
queries manifest counts for L1 entries and L2 ledger size at compaction boundary
queries manifest counts on demand mid-session
queries L2 ledger pointers; optionally requests body fetch from Session.messages
fetches ToolPart.output body when include_body flag is set; no payload duplication
queries L1 entries with stale-evidence omission
